response:
siraghu mahala 3 || guru mukhi krapa kare bhagati kie jai bin gu r bhagati n hoeyi || apae ap milaae boohai ta nirmal hoavei soeyi || har ji eu saachaa saachi baaani milaava hoi || 1 || bhai re bhagati hien kahae jagi aia || peure guru ke sev n kieni birthaa janam guavaia 1 || rahau || apae jagajivan sukdaata apae baksimilaae jeeey janta ke kia vecharae kia ko aakhaae suanaae || guru mukhi apae deei wadaai apae sev karaae || 2 || dekhi kutambu mohiba lobaana chaldia nali n jaiye || sat guru sev guan niidaan paai tis die kima paai || har pri bhau saxa meitera pri bhau meraa antee hoeyi saxae || apane man chi ti khaae khaae bin gu r ap n jaiye || har jiu daata bhagati vchal hae ki ripa man ni vasaae || nank sohba surta deey prabhau apae guru mukhi de wadiayi || 15 || 48 ||
